jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Mamaearth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mamaearth! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mamaearth:
Mamaearth is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth!
